overview: A beautiful nature photo gallery where anyone can upload and view stunning nature images. Features a responsive masonry grid, drag-and-drop uploads, and silky-smooth animations throughout.
features: Drag-and-drop image upload with progress feedback
Public masonry gallery visible to everyone
Smooth fade-in and staggered animations on image load
Full-screen lightbox with smooth open/close transitions
Responsive design for mobile, tablet, and desktop
